titleStmt.title: SII 24.355: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 355. (A.R. No. 5 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of 320 poṉ by Narasammaṉ, wife of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kommarāja Periya Timmarāja Uḍaiyar, for a perpetual lamp and for offerings to god Raṅganātha, a portion of which offerings was to be utilised for a feeding charity at Kandāḍai Rāmānujayyaṅgār's Rāmānujakūṭam. The date viz., Śaka 1419, Piṅgaḷa, Karkaṭaka, ba. 14, Tuesday, Pūraṭṭādi corresponds regularly to A.D. 1497, July 18, ·62, ·39.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakābtam 1000 4 100 10 9- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa piṅkala samvatsarattu katkaṭakanāyaṟṟu kṛṣṇapakṣattu caturtthiyum maṅgalavāramum peṟṟa pūraṭṭātināḷ perumāḷ śrī raṅganāthadevatku śrīman dharaṇivarāha mahāmaṇḍaleśvara
kommarāca periya timmarāca Uṭaiyar tevikaḷ narasammaṉ Upaiyam Āka nāḷatu mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oru taḷikai Amutu ceytu Aruḷi viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālil Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi prasātamum kantāṭai rāmānujayyaṅkār rāmānu
ja kūṭattukku naṭakkattakkatāka kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇi Intat taḷikai Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi kaṟiamutu neyyamutu Uṭpaṭṭa vakaikku poli Ūṭṭukku mutaliṭṭa poṉ 3 100 Ituvum tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku poliūṭṭukku mutaliṭṭa poṉ
2 10 Āka poṉ 3 100 2 10 Intap poṉ muṉṉūṟṟu Irupatum śrī paṇṭārattile celuttiṉapaṭi Āle Inta Oru taḷikaiyum Oru tiruviḷakkum cantrātittavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatu Ākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
